France , Canada and Australia have also dismissed the prospect.

Chinese e-commerce giant JD.com led by 'China's Jeff Bezos' has launched its new Joybuy platform in Britain in what could be a seismic moment for UK online retail. The £250billion firm wants to challenge Amazon and is offering more than 100,000 products for bargain-hunting shoppers, ranging from smartphones to baby wipes. The move comes after China's largest retailer - not related to JD Sports - pulled out of talks for two separate deals to buy major UK retail brands over the past two years.

The article, published on Saturday, features an interview with a Palestinian cafe owner in Archway, north London where a new branch of Gail's was recently established. Erika Waring, 65, was dropping her mother Margaret, 88, at the main entrance of Wilmslow Railway Station in Cheshire at 1.20pm on August 21, 2025, when staff told her she had driven into a restricted area and directed her to the car park. Waring, who is Head of Travel and Events for the international healthcare communications company Havas Lynx, was taking her mother, who has severe mobility issues, to London on a West Coast train for a day of sightseeing. A wall that showed the handprints of Grenfell Tower victims who were trapped in the building as the fire raged has been destroyed.    Relatives of the 72 people who died in the 2017 blaze in North Kensington, west London, made the disturbing discovery of the wall, between the 12th and 14th floors, during pre-demolition visits to the building in July last year. A powerful photograph of the stairwell shows the space completely blackened with smoke - and marked with prints of all different sizes.

  • John was very sick for a long time before he died. She would've known that the end was coming a long while ago; the ups and downs of a long-term illness are hard on a relationship. She deserves to be out with friends. Anyone who has gone through the grieving process knows that one minute you are OK, and then the loss and sadness come over you like a wave.   • Greg James is a national treasurer, his show and the breakfast team saved me through Covid (a time in which he was really struggling too but you would never have known). He managed to get the tone of both of those spot on whilst most importantly letting people know there is no right/wrong way to feel and however it is you are feeling you are not alone. Japan is a magnificant country to visit.

To help Japan visitors get the most out of cherry blossom season this spring, Tokyo local Takao Nishina has shared ten tips and tricks, which include arriving early to key hotspots and heading out for nighttime strolls for an alternative view of the stunning soft pink trees. The natural phenomenon takes place over the course of two weeks, beginning in the southern tip in Okinawa, before sweeping north, finishing in Hokkaido.
  • 12 comments
  • share Japan resident reveals how to beat the cherry blossom crowds

Email

Sweet little mite.

A female sloth named Reina delivered a healthy cub while suspended 14 meters above the ground. In a display of instinct that mirrored life in the wild, Reina remained hanging from the branches of a towering tree in her enclosure throughout the labour. The newborn cub, measuring approximately 20 centimetres long, was seen clinging tightly to its mother's fur moments after entering the world. Baby sloths are born fully developed, with claws that allow them to cling to their mother from the very first second of life.
  • 32 comments
  • share Just hanging out! Reina the two-toed sloth holds her newborn baby
